privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real USLCI database imported from /home/ga/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip. The target process name 'IP-Protected Cement LCI', source process 'Cement, Portland', output path '/home/ga/LCA_Results/protected_cement_lci.zip', and the requirement of >100 exchanges for aggregation verification explicitly match the task description and verifier.py logic.
